name: rundrill-excel
description: Excel coach — learn the spreadsheet by reading, predicting, and reviewing formulas (incl. AI-generated), with drills, progress, and mistake memory, inside your AI agent.

interface.shortDescription: Excel coach: think in formulas, read & review them, build to spec.
interface.longDescription: An interactive Excel coach for the AI era: predict-the-result and diagnose-and-fix drills, build-to-spec with a self-scoring rubric, choose-the-tool, and a signature 'review the AI's formula' drill — built to catch the formula that returns a number and is quietly wrong. Backed by the RunDrill MCP engine with progress tracking and mistake memory. Core grid to PivotTables and dynamic arrays, plus analytics (Power Query/DAX), financial-modeling, automation, and dashboards tracks.
defaultPrompt: Quiz me on what this formula returns.
Review an AI-written formula and let me find the bug.
